raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/Chat/Agent: Consolidation wires Codex/agent routing failure surface into AgentBridge without changing conversation ownership.

Detects the installed Codex CLI and seeds OMI_CODEX_ADAPTER_COMMAND so the shared agent runtime can drive Codex over ACP; named non-production fault bundle supplies an inert hermetic model token so fault injection reaches the configured remote 5xx backend without Firebase auth.
